statement: In every magma, Equation 248 (`x = (y * (z * z)) * z`) implies Equation 702 (`x = y * (x * ((z * w) * u))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0103
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y (op z z)) z)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op x (op (op z w) u)))
